description: Salesmate is a CRM with built-in automation that unifies sales, marketing, and support, helping small and mid-size teams manage pipelines and close deals faster.
overview: Salesmate is a customizable CRM that brings sales, marketing, and support together, using AI to automate tasks, speed up deals, and surface insight for growing teams.
what_is: Salesmate is a CRM that helps teams manage sales, marketing, and support in one place. It uses AI to automate routine work, move deals along, and nurture relationships, which makes it more than a basic contact database.

It is strongest at organizing pipelines, automating follow-ups, and running marketing campaigns, with quick setup and intuitive dashboards so teams see value fast. It fits small and mid-size companies focused on lead conversion and support.

Salesmate integrates with hundreds of apps like Google and Slack across CRM, communication, and automation. It is built for straightforward sales and marketing automation rather than specialized ERP or deep finance needs.
